name: Hidden Bloodhunt
short_description: Hidden Bloodhunt is an exhilarating multiplayer game where tension runs high. Play as an innocent or become a traitor. Use strategy, deception, and teamwork to survive. Who will prevail in this manhunt where shadow and cunning are your allies? Get ready to hunt or be hunted in Hidden Bloodhunt!
detailed_description:
Dive into Hidden Bloodhunt, an intense multiplayer game where strategy and suspicion are key. Choose to play as an innocent, whose goal is to repair generators while uncovering the traitors, or become a traitor, determined to eliminate innocents without being discovered. Every decision can be fatal in this fierce struggle for survival. Will you be able to outsmart your opponents or survive their schemes? Get ready for a gaming experience where every second counts!

Rules of Hidden Bloodhunt

Hidden Bloodhunt is a multiplayer game where players take on the roles of innocents or traitors in an environment filled with tension and strategy. Here are the rules of the game:

Roles:

  • Innocents: Their objective is to repair all the generators to win. They must work together to unmask the traitors and protect themselves.

  • Traitors: Their goal is to eliminate all the innocents without getting caught. They can also sabotage the generators to prevent the innocents from winning.

Game Phases:

  • Players start the game without knowing each other's roles.

  • Innocents must move around the environment to repair the generators while traitors attempt to stop them.

Voting for Expulsion:

  • Players can initiate a vote to expel a player they suspect is a traitor.

  • If the expelled player is innocent, they die and can no longer participate.

  • If it was a traitor, the innocents must find and kill them before the time runs out.

Traitor System:

  • An eliminated traitor drops a knife.

  • If an innocent picks up this knife, they become "bloodthirsty." As a bloodthirsty player, they can now kill all players, whether innocent or traitor.

Victory Conditions:

  • Innocents win by repairing all the generators.

  • Traitors win if all innocents are eliminated before they manage to repair the generators.

Survival:

  • Players must hide and avoid being discovered, especially as innocents, to have a chance of winning.

These rules create a captivating gameplay dynamic that combines strategy, deduction, and action. Get ready to hunt or be hunted in Hidden Bloodhunt!
